title: Enforce thread requirement in Congress workflow

log.context: Enforce thread requirement in Congress workflow

Done. Here's what was changed and how thread creation now works:

**File modified:** `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/workflows/congress_wf.py`

**What changed:** The `except ActivityError` block in section 3 of `_run_inner` previously had a blanket fallback: any failure in `congress_create_thread` would set `thread_id = chat_id`. This meant if thread creation failed while `chat_id` was the main channel, all debate posts would go directly to the main channel.
